basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing (IIITDM) Jabalpur
basic_details.short_information: PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for an interdisciplinary ANRF project combining molecular communication, terahertz technology, machine learning, and biomedical applications for cancer therapeutics. Candidates with strong background in ECE or allied branches can apply.

age_limit.age_details: Initially 1 year, extendable for one more year based on performance

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job responsibilities: Early cancer detection using molecular communication, cancer stage classification and tissue localization through machine learning, optimizing nanomachine-based drug delivery, analyzing terahertz wave attenuation
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech with 1st class or equivalent in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) or any allied branch relevant to the project

how_to_apply: Candidates can apply by filling the online Google Form at: https://forms.gle/UxBivVMsDeDjDeHd8 Last Date: 02 August 2026
For any queries regarding the position, contact the Principal Investigator.
important_instructions: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be given for appearing in the interview. Shortlisted candidates will be notified by email only. Selected candidates can register for Ph.D. at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur as per eligibility.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur invites applications for engagement of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in the ANRF PMECRG funded project. The selected candidate will work on cutting-edge research involving 6G molecular communication, terahertz systems, cancer detection, and targeted drug delivery. The appointment is initially for one year and extendable for one more year based on satisfactory performance. Selected candidates will be eligible to register for the Ph.D. degree at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for an interdisciplinary ANRF project combining molecular communication, terahertz technology, machine learning, and biomedical applications for cancer therapeutics. Candidates with strong background in ECE or allied branches can apply.

rows.pdpm_indian_institute_of_information_tec: Synergistic Fusion of 6G Molecular Communication and Terahertz Systems for Early Cancer Detection and Targeted Drug Delivery
Initially 1 year, extendable for one more year based on performance

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application (Google Form)

rows.details: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech with 1st class or equivalent in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) or any allied branch relevant to the project
GATE/NET qualified candidates preferred. Experience in areas of communication, signal processing, machine learning, molecular communication, or terahertz systems

Early cancer detection using molecular communication, cancer stage classification and tissue localization through machine learning, optimizing nanomachine-based drug delivery, analyzing terahertz wave attenuation

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIITDM JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates can apply by filling the online Google Form at: https://forms.gle/UxBivVMsDeDjDeHd8 Last Date: 02 August 2026 For any queries regarding the position, contact the Principal Investigator.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIITDM JRF Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be given for appearing in the interview. Shortlisted candidates will be notified by email only. Selected candidates can register for Ph.D. at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur as per eligibility.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for filling the Google Form is 02 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF positions are available in the ANRF project at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the monthly fellowship for JRF at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur?
faq.answer: The fellowship is Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech with 1st class or equivalent in ECE or allied branches relevant to the project.

faq.question: Q5. What is the focus of the ANRF project at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur?
faq.answer: Synergistic Fusion of 6G Molecular Communication and Terahertz Systems for Early Cancer Detection and Targeted Drug Delivery.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for the PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur JRF position?
faq.answer: Fill the online Google Form available at https://forms.gle/UxBivVMsDeDjDeHd8.

faq.question: Q7. When is the written test/interview for PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur JRF?
faq.answer: Tentatively on 06 August 2026 at 11:00 AM (offline mode).

faq.question: Q8. Is GATE/NET qualification preferred for this JRF position?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to GATE/NET qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Can selected JRF candidates pursue Ph.D. at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates will be eligible to register for the Ph.D. degree as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q10. Is the JRF position at PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary project-based position initially for one year, extendable based on performance.
